Runs marriage compatibility analysis. Takes date of birth, time, and location of birth of bride and groom. Keeps guna milan point calculation as is. Also does mangalik dosha check and further analysis beyond points as highlighted in https://soulnakshatra.com/kundali-matching-beyond-points/ and https://www.vedaz.io/blogs/compatibility-beyond-kundli-matching.
